title: Switzerland (Canton Zürich) Personal Income and Wealth Tax Return (Steuererklärung 2025 für natürliche Personen)
description: The Canton of Zürich's annual tax return for natural persons (Steuererklärung für natürliche Personen), covering both cantonal/communal tax (Staatssteuer) and direct federal tax (direkte Bundessteuer) in one filing, published by the Kantonales Steueramt Zürich (cantonal tax office). This document models the base 4-page main declaration (StA Form. 300) in full for the 2025 tax year: the optional representative block, personal/occupational/family particulars for up to two filers (a single taxpayer, or a married couple/registered partnership filing jointly), the household's dependent children and supported persons, all numbered income lines (employment, self-employment, social-insurance pensions and annuities, securities, other income, real estate), all numbered deduction lines (professional expenses, debt interest, alimony/maintenance, pillar 3a contributions, insurance premiums, further education, disability and medical costs, donations, the fixed social deductions for children/supported persons/spouse, and intercantonal/international income allocation), all numbered wealth lines (securities, cash, insurance tax value, vehicles, business interests, real estate, debts, and intercantonal/international wealth allocation), lump-sum pension capital benefits, gifts/inheritances received or given, and the filing/signature block. It deliberately does NOT model: the companion Wertschriftenverzeichnis (securities and holdings inventory), Berufsauslagen (Form 360, professional-expenses schedule), Versicherungsprämien (Form 365, insurance-premiums schedule), Aus- und Weiterbildung (Form 367), Liegenschaftenverzeichnis (real-estate register), Schuldenverzeichnis (debts register), or Hilfsblatt A/B/G (self-employment worksheets) — each a distinct, separately-published PDF referenced by line on the main return and left as an open backlog candidate for a future cycle, represented here only as documents[] supporting-evidence requirements — nor any pure computed/arithmetic line (a total, a carried-forward transfer, or a value derived only from a statutory cap applied to another field already captured, e.g. the taxable portions of pensions/annuities and the capped pillar-3a/insurance-premium deductions), reproduced in this document's field descriptions and VERIFICATION.md where relevant. It does not submit the return; the live source (zh.ch / the ZHprivateTax online filing portal) is always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Switzerland, the Canton of Zürich, or its Kantonales Steueramt.

authority.name: Kanton Zürich — Finanzdirektion, Kantonales Steueramt Zürich

source.documentRef: StA Form. 300 (2025) 12.25 — Steuererklärung 2025 für natürliche Personen, Kanton Zürich, Staats-, Gemeinde- und direkte Bundessteuer (4-page base return), read together with the Kantonales Steueramt Zürich's own 40-page 'Wegleitung zur Steuererklärung 2025' at https://www.zh.ch/content/dam/zhweb/bilder-dokumente/themen/steuern-finanzen/steuern/natuerlichepersonen/2025/est-wegleitungen/305_Wegleitung_ZH_2025_HA%20bf%20DEF.pdf

verification.notes: GOV-1847: GovSchema Standard Research cycle. Closes Switzerland's Taxes gap, a candidate the prior CH cycle (GOV-1840, which opened Switzerland as the registry's 27th jurisdiction via the DMV vertical) had explicitly flagged as 'a genuinely strong, open backlog candidate' — canton Zürich's own tax office publishes a genuine, current, unauthenticated, flat (non-AcroForm) main-declaration PDF alongside companion schedules and a 40-page Wegleitung. Both the main return (300 STE ZH 2025 HA DEF.pdf, 99,652 bytes, 4 pages) and the Wegleitung (305_Wegleitung_ZH_2025_HA bf DEF.pdf, 40 pages) were fetched fresh this cycle directly from zh.ch's own tax-forms listing page (HTTP 200, no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate). pdfjs-dist extraction and a pdf-lib AcroForm scan both confirm zero Widget annotations across all 4 pages of the main return — a flat print/reference facsimile PDF completed on paper or via the authenticated ZHprivateTax online portal, not a fillable AcroForm — so every field below was read from the main return's own printed, numbered lines (100 through 519, plus the unnumbered representative/personal-particulars/dependents and signature blocks) and cross-checked against the Wegleitung's own explanatory sections, which restate several lines' statutory caps and rates (e.g. the pillar-3a CHF 7'258/36'288 caps, the CHF 25'000/25'800 childcare cap, the CHF 20'600/10'300 donation ceiling, the 5%-of-net-income medical-cost floor) quoted directly into this schema's field descriptions since the return itself prints only some of these figures. Scope was bounded to the main return's own directly-printed lines, excluding every companion schedule referenced by name on the form (Wertschriftenverzeichnis, Berufsauslagen, Versicherungsprämien, Aus- und Weiterbildung, Liegenschaftenverzeichnis, Schuldenverzeichnis, Hilfsblatt A/B/G) and every pure computed/arithmetic or capped-derivative line. See VERIFICATION.md for the full line-by-line source mapping, every disclosed scope decision, and a worked mock-data example.

fields.name: representativeNameOrFirm
fields.label: Name / Firma
fields.description: Name or firm name of a representative (e.g. a trustee/tax advisor) authorized to receive requests and decisions/assessment rulings (Auflagen und Entscheide bzw. Veranlagungsverfügungen) on the taxpayer's behalf. Completed only if a representative is appointed.

fields.name: representativeFirstName
fields.label: Vorname
fields.description: The representative's first name.

fields.name: representativePhone
fields.label: Telefon
fields.description: The representative's telephone number.

fields.name: representativeStreet
fields.label: Strasse
fields.description: Street name of the representative's business address.

fields.name: representativeHouseNumber
fields.label: Nr.
fields.description: House number of the representative's business address.

fields.name: representativeAdvisorId
fields.label: Treuhänder-ID
fields.description: Trustee/tax-advisor identification number, when the representative has one.

fields.name: representativePostalCode
fields.label: PLZ
fields.description: Postal code of the representative's business address.

fields.name: representativePlace
fields.label: Ort
fields.description: Town/city of the representative's business address.

fields.name: representativeUidChe
fields.label: CHE
fields.description: The representative firm's Swiss business identification number (UID), printed with a fixed 'CHE' prefix on the form; only the CHE-XXX.XXX.XXX digit groups are entered in the box.

fields.name: person1DateOfBirth
fields.label: Geburtsdatum (Person 1)
fields.description: Date of birth of Person 1 (the sole filer, or the husband/registered partner 1 on a joint return).

fields.name: person2DateOfBirth
fields.label: Geburtsdatum (Person 2)
fields.description: Date of birth of Person 2 (the wife/registered partner 2), completed only on a joint return.

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Zivilstand
fields.description: The taxpayer's civil status as of 31 December 2025 (e.g. ledig/single, verheiratet/married, verwitwet/widowed, geschieden/divorced, getrennt/separated). The form's own glossary note states that marriage-related terms (verheiratet, getrennt, geschieden, verwitwet, Ehe, Ehegatten, Ehemann, Ehefrau) apply equally to a registered same-sex partnership (eingetragene Partnerschaft). Modelled as free text: the source PDF prints only the field label, with no enumerated on-page option list captured in its text layer.

fields.name: person2FirstName
fields.label: Vorname (Person 2)
fields.description: Person 2's first name. Person 1's own name is pre-printed by the tax office when mailing the paper form (address window) rather than entered here, so only Person 2 (a spouse/partner newly declared on this return) has a first-name field on this page.

fields.name: person1Religion
fields.label: Konfession (Person 1)
fields.description: Person 1's religious confession/denomination, relevant to Swiss church-tax liability.

fields.name: person2Religion
fields.label: Konfession (Person 2)
fields.description: Person 2's religious confession/denomination.

fields.name: person1Occupation
fields.label: Beruf (Person 1)
fields.description: Person 1's occupation.

fields.name: person2Occupation
fields.label: Beruf (Person 2)
fields.description: Person 2's occupation.

fields.name: person1Phone
fields.label: Telefon (Person 1)
fields.description: Person 1's telephone number.

fields.name: person2Phone
fields.label: Telefon (Person 2)
fields.description: Person 2's telephone number.

fields.name: person1Email
fields.label: E-Mail (Person 1)
fields.description: Person 1's email address.

fields.name: person2Email
fields.label: E-Mail (Person 2)
fields.description: Person 2's email address.

fields.name: person1OrdinaryPensionFundContributions
fields.label: Ordentliche Beiträge an die Pensionskasse (2. Säule)? (Person 1)
fields.description: Whether Person 1 pays ordinary (mandatory) contributions to an occupational pension fund (2nd pillar/Pensionskasse).

fields.name: person2OrdinaryPensionFundContributions
fields.label: Ordentliche Beiträge an die Pensionskasse (2. Säule)? (Person 2)
fields.description: Whether Person 2 pays ordinary (mandatory) contributions to an occupational pension fund (2nd pillar/Pensionskasse).

fields.name: childrenInHouseholdDetails
fields.label: Kinder in Ihrem Haushalt
fields.description: One entry per child of birth years 2008-2025 (or a child still in initial vocational/professional training) whose maintenance the taxpayer bears, living in the taxpayer's own household: first name, surname, date of birth, school or apprenticeship employer (if in training), the month through which support is expected to continue, and (only if the taxpayer is single, divorced, or lives separated from their spouse) whether the other parent pays maintenance contributions. Collapsed into one free-text field per the source table's own repeating rows.
fields.sourceRef: p.1, Kinder in Ihrem Haushalt table

fields.name: childrenOutsideHouseholdDetails
fields.label: Kinder ausserhalb Ihres Haushaltes
fields.description: One entry per child (as above) who does not live in the household: first name, surname, date of birth, address, school or apprenticeship employer, and the month through which support is expected to continue. Collapsed into one free-text field per the source table.
fields.sourceRef: p.1, Kinder ausserhalb Ihres Haushaltes table

fields.name: supportedPersonsInHouseholdDetails
fields.label: Erwerbsunfähige oder beschränkt erwerbsfähige Personen in Ihrem Haushalt
fields.description: One entry per person unable to work or with limited earning capacity (other than a spouse/partner or a child already listed above), living in the taxpayer's own household, whom the taxpayer supports with an annual contribution of at least CHF 2'800 (state tax) / CHF 6'800 (federal tax): first name, surname, year of birth, and the annual support amount in CHF. Collapsed into one free-text field per the source table.
fields.sourceRef: p.1, Erwerbsunfähige... In Ihrem Haushalt table

fields.name: supportedPersonsOutsideHouseholdDetails
fields.label: Erwerbsunfähige oder beschränkt erwerbsfähige Personen ausserhalb Ihres Haushaltes
fields.description: Same as supportedPersonsInHouseholdDetails, for a supported person who does not live in the household: first name, surname, year of birth, address, and the annual support amount in CHF. Collapsed into one free-text field per the source table.
fields.sourceRef: p.1, Erwerbsunfähige... Ausserhalb Ihres Haushaltes table

fields.name: employmentIncomeMainPerson1
fields.label: 1.1 Haupterwerb Person 1 (Lohnausweis)
fields.description: Person 1's income from a main employed occupation (unselbständige Erwerbstätigkeit), per their salary certificate (Lohnausweis).

fields.name: employmentIncomeMainPerson2
fields.label: 1.1 Haupterwerb Person 2 (Lohnausweis)
fields.description: Person 2's income from a main employed occupation, per their salary certificate.

fields.name: employmentIncomeSidePerson1
fields.label: 1.2 Nebenerwerb Person 1 (Lohnausweis)
fields.description: Person 1's income from a secondary employed occupation, or compensation for services of any kind, board/committee remuneration, fees, royalties, author's rights and similar, per their salary certificate.

fields.name: employmentIncomeSidePerson2
fields.label: 1.2 Nebenerwerb Person 2 (Lohnausweis)
fields.description: Person 2's income from a secondary employed occupation (same categories as employmentIncomeSidePerson1), per their salary certificate.

fields.name: selfEmploymentIncomeMainPerson1
fields.label: 2.1 Haupterwerb Person 1 (Hilfsblatt)
fields.description: Person 1's income from a main self-employed occupation in trade, commerce, a liberal profession (Hilfsblatt A) or agriculture (Hilfsblatt B or G), including income from qualified participations held as business assets and liquidation gains on ceasing self-employment.

fields.name: selfEmploymentIncomeMainPerson2
fields.label: 2.1 Haupterwerb Person 2 (Hilfsblatt)
fields.description: Person 2's income from a main self-employed occupation (same categories as selfEmploymentIncomeMainPerson1).

fields.name: selfEmploymentIncomeSidePerson1
fields.label: 2.2 Nebenerwerb Person 1 (Hilfsblatt)
fields.description: Person 1's income from a secondary self-employed occupation.

fields.name: selfEmploymentIncomeSidePerson2
fields.label: 2.2 Nebenerwerb Person 2 (Hilfsblatt bzw. Aufstellung)
fields.description: Person 2's income from a secondary self-employed occupation.

fields.name: ahvIvPensionPerson1
fields.label: 3.1 AHV-/IV-Renten (100%) Person 1
fields.description: Person 1's old-age/survivors' or disability insurance pension (AHV/IV-Rente), taxable in full (100%).

fields.name: ahvIvPensionPerson2
fields.label: 3.1 AHV-/IV-Renten (100%) Person 2
fields.description: Person 2's old-age/survivors' or disability insurance pension, taxable in full (100%).

fields.name: pensionAnnuityRow1AmountPerson1
fields.label: 3.2 Renten / Pensionen — Person 1, Betrag (1)
fields.description: Person 1's first reported pension/annuity: the gross amount received, before applying the taxable percentage. Private and foreign life annuities require the underlying annuity contract (copy) and the insurer's own tax certificate to be filed with the return.

fields.name: pensionAnnuityRow1PercentPerson1
fields.label: 3.2 Renten / Pensionen — Person 1, Prozente (1)
fields.description: The percentage of pensionAnnuityRow1AmountPerson1 that is taxable, per the statutory taxable-portion rules for the type of pension/annuity (e.g. 100% for most pensions; a published ESTV rate for private life annuities, calculated as gross annuity x rate / 100). Left blank for a private/foreign life annuity, whose taxable Ertragsanteil is instead entered directly in the main column.

fields.name: pensionAnnuityRow2AmountPerson1
fields.label: 3.2 Renten / Pensionen — Person 1, Betrag (2)
fields.description: Person 1's second reported pension/annuity (if any), gross amount.

fields.name: pensionAnnuityRow2PercentPerson1
fields.label: 3.2 Renten / Pensionen — Person 1, Prozente (2)
fields.description: The taxable percentage for pensionAnnuityRow2AmountPerson1.

fields.name: pensionAnnuityRow1AmountPerson2
fields.label: 3.2 Renten / Pensionen — Person 2, Betrag (1)
fields.description: Person 2's first reported pension/annuity, gross amount.

fields.name: pensionAnnuityRow1PercentPerson2
fields.label: 3.2 Renten / Pensionen — Person 2, Prozente (1)
fields.description: The taxable percentage for pensionAnnuityRow1AmountPerson2.

fields.name: pensionAnnuityRow2AmountPerson2
fields.label: 3.2 Renten / Pensionen — Person 2, Betrag (2)
fields.description: Person 2's second reported pension/annuity (if any), gross amount.

fields.name: pensionAnnuityRow2PercentPerson2
fields.label: 3.2 Renten / Pensionen — Person 2, Prozente (2)
fields.description: The taxable percentage for pensionAnnuityRow2AmountPerson2.

fields.name: unemploymentInsuranceBenefitsPerson1
fields.label: 3.3 Erwerbsausfallentschädigungen aus Arbeitslosenversicherung Person 1
fields.description: Person 1's loss-of-earnings compensation paid directly by unemployment insurance, per the insurer's certificate (Bescheinigung).

fields.name: unemploymentInsuranceBenefitsPerson2
fields.label: 3.3 Erwerbsausfallentschädigungen aus Arbeitslosenversicherung Person 2
fields.description: Person 2's loss-of-earnings compensation from unemployment insurance.

fields.name: familyAllowancesAndDailyBenefitsPerson1
fields.label: 3.4 Kinder- und Familienzulagen, Mutterschaftsentschädigungen, Taggelder Person 1
fields.description: Person 1's child/family allowances, maternity compensation, and daily benefits from health, accident, military, and disability insurance, and EO (loss-of-earnings) compensation, paid directly by the compensation office rather than through an employer, per the insurer's certificate.

fields.name: familyAllowancesAndDailyBenefitsPerson2
fields.label: 3.4 Kinder- und Familienzulagen, Mutterschaftsentschädigungen, Taggelder Person 2
fields.description: Person 2's child/family allowances, maternity compensation, and daily benefits (same categories as familyAllowancesAndDailyBenefitsPerson1).

fields.name: securitiesAndOtherAssetsIncome
fields.label: 4.1 Ertrag aus Wertschriften, Guthaben und Lotterien
fields.description: Total income from securities, bank/other claims, and lotteries, per the securities and holdings inventory (Wertschriftenverzeichnis) — a companion form this schema does not itself model (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: qualifiedParticipationIncomePortion
fields.label: 4.2 Davon aus qualifizierten Beteiligungen
fields.description: The portion of securitiesAndOtherAssetsIncome attributable to qualified participations (subject to partial taxation).

fields.name: alimonyFromExSpouse
fields.label: 5.1 Unterhaltsbeiträge vom geschiedenen / getrennten Ehegatten / Partn.
fields.description: Maintenance/alimony payments received from a divorced or separated spouse/registered partner.

fields.name: childSupportReceived
fields.label: 5.2 Unterhaltsbeiträge für minderjährige Kinder
fields.description: Maintenance payments received for minor children, up to the month they reach the age of majority.

fields.name: proceedsFromBusinessSharesOrCorporateInterests
fields.label: 5.3 Ertrag aus Geschäfts- und Korporationsanteilen
fields.description: Income from business shares and corporate-body interests (Korporationsanteile), per an itemized statement (Aufstellung).

fields.name: otherIncome
fields.label: 5.4 Weitere Einkünfte, nähere Bezeichnung
fields.description: Other income not falling under any preceding category, with its own free-text description on the source form (this schema does not separately model that description text).

fields.name: capitalSettlementForRecurringBenefitsMonths
fields.label: 5.5 Kapitalabfindungen für wiederkehrende Leistungen — Monate
fields.description: Number of months a lump-sum capital settlement (Kapitalabfindung) received in lieu of recurring periodic benefits is treated as covering.

fields.name: capitalSettlementForRecurringBenefitsAmount
fields.label: 5.5 Kapitalabfindungen für wiederkehrende Leistungen
fields.description: Amount of a lump-sum capital settlement received in lieu of recurring periodic benefits (e.g. a commuted alimony or pension entitlement). Capital benefits from occupational/private pension arrangements paid out on death or lasting incapacity are reported separately at capitalBenefitDeathOrDisabilityAmount (line 510), not here.

fields.name: netRealEstateIncome
fields.label: 6. Nettoertrag aus Liegenschaften
fields.description: Net income from real estate (rental value/rental income less deductible property costs), per the real-estate register (Liegenschaftenverzeichnis) — a companion form this schema does not itself model.

fields.name: professionalExpensesPerson1StateTax
fields.label: 11.1 Berufsauslagen Person 1 — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Person 1's deductible professional expenses for employed work (Berufsauslagen), state-tax column, per the professional-expenses schedule (Form 360) — a companion form this schema does not itself model.

fields.name: professionalExpensesPerson1FederalTax
fields.label: 11.1 Berufsauslagen Person 1 — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Person 1's deductible professional expenses, federal-tax column.

fields.name: professionalExpensesPerson2StateTax
fields.label: 11.2 Berufsauslagen Person 2 — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Person 2's deductible professional expenses, state-tax column.

fields.name: professionalExpensesPerson2FederalTax
fields.label: 11.2 Berufsauslagen Person 2 — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Person 2's deductible professional expenses, federal-tax column.

fields.name: debtInterestStateTax
fields.label: 12. Schuldzinsen — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Debt interest paid (to the extent not already deducted under income line 2), state-tax column, per the debts register (Schuldenverzeichnis) — a companion form this schema does not itself model.

fields.name: debtInterestFederalTax
fields.label: 12. Schuldzinsen — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Debt interest paid, federal-tax column.

fields.name: alimonyToExSpouseStateTax
fields.label: 13.1 Unterhaltsbeiträge an den geschiedenen/getrennten Ehegatten — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Maintenance/alimony paid to a divorced or separated spouse/registered partner, state-tax column.

fields.name: alimonyToExSpouseFederalTax
fields.label: 13.1 Unterhaltsbeiträge an den geschiedenen/getrennten Ehegatten — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Maintenance/alimony paid to a divorced or separated spouse, federal-tax column.

fields.name: childSupportPaidStateTax
fields.label: 13.2 Unterhaltsbeiträge für minderjährige Kinder — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Maintenance paid for minor children, up to the month they reach the age of majority, state-tax column.

fields.name: childSupportPaidFederalTax
fields.label: 13.2 Unterhaltsbeiträge für minderjährige Kinder — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Maintenance paid for minor children, federal-tax column.

fields.name: annuityPaymentsGrossAmount
fields.label: 13.3 Rentenleistungen — CHF (Gesamtbetrag)
fields.description: Gross amount of annuity/pension payments (Rentenleistungen) the taxpayer pays out to someone else, before applying the deductible taxable-income-share percentage; proof of payment must be filed with the return.

fields.name: pillar3aContributionPerson1
fields.label: 14.1 Person 1 — eff. CHF (Beiträge Säule 3a)
fields.description: Person 1's actual contributions/premiums paid in 2025 to a recognized form of tied individual pension provision (Säule 3a), per the pension institution's certificate. Deductible up to CHF 7'258 for a taxpayer who belongs to an occupational pension fund (2nd pillar), or up to 20% of earned income (max. CHF 36'288) for one who does not.

fields.name: pillar3aContributionPerson2
fields.label: 14.2 Person 2 — eff. CHF (Beiträge Säule 3a)
fields.description: Person 2's actual Säule 3a contributions paid in 2025, same caps as pillar3aContributionPerson1 (each spouse who is separately employed and has their own 3a pension contract may claim this deduction independently).

fields.name: insurancePremiumsAndSavingsInterestStateTax
fields.label: 15. Versicherungsprämien, Zinsen von Sparkapitalien — Staatssteuer
fields.description: The lower of (A) actual private health/accident/life/annuity insurance premiums and savings interest paid, or (B) the applicable statutory maximum (which varies by marital status and by whether contributions were also made to the 2nd or 3rd pillar), state-tax column, computed via the insurance-premiums schedule (Form 365) — a companion form this schema does not itself model.

fields.name: insurancePremiumsAndSavingsInterestFederalTax
fields.label: 15. Versicherungsprämien, Zinsen von Sparkapitalien — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Same as insurancePremiumsAndSavingsInterestStateTax, federal-tax column (the statutory maxima differ between the state- and federal-tax columns).

fields.name: ahvIv2ndPillarContributionsNotAlreadyDeductedStateTax
fields.label: 16.1 Beiträge an die AHV, IV und 2. Säule, sofern nicht unter Ziff. 1 und 2 abgezogen — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Contributions to AHV, IV, and the occupational pension fund (2nd pillar) not already deducted from income lines 1 or 2 (e.g. a self-employed or non-employed taxpayer's own direct contributions), state-tax column.

fields.name: ahvIv2ndPillarContributionsNotAlreadyDeductedFederalTax
fields.label: 16.1 Beiträge an die AHV, IV und 2. Säule, sofern nicht unter Ziff. 1 und 2 abgezogen — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Same as ahvIv2ndPillarContributionsNotAlreadyDeductedStateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: furtherEducationCostsStateTax
fields.label: 16.2 Berufsorientierte Aus- und Weiterbildungskosten — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Career-oriented further-education and retraining costs, up to a total of CHF 12,400, state-tax column, per the further-education/training worksheet (Form 367) — a companion form this schema does not itself model.

fields.name: furtherEducationCostsFederalTax
fields.label: 16.2 Berufsorientierte Aus- und Weiterbildungskosten — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Same as furtherEducationCostsStateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: assetManagementCostsStateTax
fields.label: 16.3 Kosten für die Verwaltung des beweglichen Privatvermögens — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Costs of third-party management of movable private assets, state-tax column.

fields.name: assetManagementCostsFederalTax
fields.label: 16.3 Kosten für die Verwaltung des beweglichen Privatvermögens — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Same as assetManagementCostsStateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: disabilityRelatedCostsStateTax
fields.label: 16.4 Behinderungsbedingte Kosten — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Disability-related costs (net of third-party reimbursements and a living-cost share), state-tax column, per the disability-costs worksheet ('Aufstellung über behinderungsbedingte Kosten') — a companion form this schema does not itself model.

fields.name: disabilityRelatedCostsFederalTax
fields.label: 16.4 Behinderungsbedingte Kosten — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Same as disabilityRelatedCostsStateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: otherDeductionsStateTax
fields.label: 16.5 Weitere Abzüge (z.B. Beiträge an politische Parteien) — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Other deductions not covered elsewhere, e.g. contributions to a political party registered under Art. 76a of the federal political-rights act, per an itemized statement (Aufstellung), state-tax column.

fields.name: otherDeductionsFederalTax
fields.label: 16.5 Weitere Abzüge (z.B. Beiträge an politische Parteien) — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Same as otherDeductionsStateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: childcareCostsStateTax
fields.label: 16.6 Abzug für fremdbetreute Kinder — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Deduction for third-party childcare costs, for children of birth years 2011-2025, state-tax column, capped at CHF 25'000.

fields.name: childcareCostsFederalTax
fields.label: 16.6 Abzug für fremdbetreute Kinder — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Same as childcareCostsStateTax, federal-tax column, capped at CHF 25'800.

fields.name: dualEarnerDeductionStateTax
fields.label: 17. Sonderabzug bei Erwerbstätigkeit beider Ehegatten/Partn. — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Special deduction available when both spouses/registered partners are gainfully employed, state-tax column; the form refers the taxpayer to the Wegleitung (instruction guide) for the computation, printing no statutory figure directly on the return itself.

fields.name: dualEarnerDeductionFederalTax
fields.label: 17. Sonderabzug bei Erwerbstätigkeit beider Ehegatten/Partn. — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Same as dualEarnerDeductionStateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: medicalAndAccidentCostsStateTax
fields.label: 22.1 Krankheits- und Unfallkosten — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Deductible medical and accident costs (borne by the taxpayer or a dependant) exceeding the statutory deductible of 5% of net income (Nettoeinkommen, line 310), state-tax column, per a dedicated worksheet.

fields.name: medicalAndAccidentCostsFederalTax
fields.label: 22.1 Krankheits- und Unfallkosten — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Same as medicalAndAccidentCostsStateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: charitableContributionsStateTax
fields.label: 22.2 Gemeinnützige Zuwendungen — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Charitable donations, per an itemized statement (Aufstellung), state-tax column. Deductible up to CHF 20'600 for a married couple in an undivided marriage, or CHF 10'300 for other taxpayers.

fields.name: charitableContributionsFederalTax
fields.label: 22.2 Gemeinnützige Zuwendungen — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Same as charitableContributionsStateTax, federal-tax column.

fields.name: childInHouseholdAllowanceStateTax
fields.label: 24.1 Abzug für Kinder in Ihrem Haushalt — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Fixed statutory allowance for each child reported in childrenInHouseholdDetails, state-tax column: CHF 9'300 per child.

fields.name: childInHouseholdAllowanceFederalTax
fields.label: 24.1 Abzug für Kinder in Ihrem Haushalt — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Same as childInHouseholdAllowanceStateTax, federal-tax column: CHF 6'800 per child.

fields.name: childOutsideHouseholdAllowanceStateTax
fields.label: Abzug für Kinder ausserhalb Ihres Haushaltes — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Fixed statutory allowance for each child reported in childrenOutsideHouseholdDetails, state-tax column: CHF 9'300 per child.

fields.name: childOutsideHouseholdAllowanceFederalTax
fields.label: Abzug für Kinder ausserhalb Ihres Haushaltes — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Same as childOutsideHouseholdAllowanceStateTax, federal-tax column: CHF 6'800 per child.

fields.name: supportedPersonAllowanceStateTax
fields.label: 24.2 Abzug für unterstützte Personen — Staatssteuer
fields.description: Fixed statutory allowance for each person reported in supportedPersonsInHouseholdDetails/supportedPersonsOutsideHouseholdDetails, state-tax column: CHF 2'800 per supported person, per a confirmation (Bestätigung).

fields.name: supportedPersonAllowanceFederalTax
fields.label: 24.2 Abzug für unterstützte Personen — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Same as supportedPersonAllowanceStateTax, federal-tax column: CHF 6'800 per supported person.

fields.name: spouseOrPartnerAllowanceFederalTax
fields.label: 24.3 Abzug für Ehegatten / Partn. — Bundessteuer
fields.description: Fixed married-couple/registered-partner allowance, federal-tax column only: CHF 2'800. The state-tax column has no equivalent box on this line — the state tax handles married-couple relief through its tariff rather than a fixed-amount deduction here.

fields.name: taxableIncomeAllocatedOtherCantons
fields.label: 26.1 Auf steuerbare Einkünfte in anderen Kantonen
fields.description: Portion of total taxable income (line 25/390) attributable to other Swiss cantons under intercantonal tax allocation (Steuerausscheidung), for a taxpayer with tax nexus in more than one canton.

fields.name: taxableIncomeAllocatedAbroad
fields.label: 26.2 Auf steuerbare Einkünfte im Ausland
fields.description: Portion of total taxable income attributable to a foreign country under international tax allocation, for a taxpayer with foreign-source income or a foreign permanent establishment/property.

fields.name: securitiesAndClaimsWealth
fields.label: 30.1 Wertschriften und Guthaben
fields.description: Taxable value of securities and claims (bank accounts, loans receivable, etc.) at 31 December 2025, per the securities and holdings inventory (Wertschriftenverzeichnis) — a companion form this schema does not itself model.

fields.name: cashGoldPreciousMetalsWealth
fields.label: 30.2 Bargeld, Gold und andere Edelmetalle
fields.description: Cash on hand, gold, and other precious metals held at 31 December 2025.

fields.name: lifeAndAnnuityInsuranceTotalTaxValue
fields.label: 30.3 Lebens- und Rentenversicherungen — Total Steuerwert
fields.description: Total tax value of life and annuity insurance policies, per the insurer(s)’ own certificates, collapsing the source form’s small repeating table (insurer, year taken out, year of maturity, tax value, one row per policy) into a single total.

fields.name: motorVehiclesWealth
fields.label: 30.4 Motorfahrzeuge
fields.description: Taxable value of motor vehicles at 31 December 2025 (the form also asks for purchase price and purchase year as supporting detail, not modelled as separate fields here).

fields.name: businessOrCorporateSharesWealth
fields.label: 30.5 Geschäfts-/Korporationsanteile
fields.description: Taxable value of business shares and corporate-body interests, per an itemized statement (Aufstellung).

fields.name: otherAssetsWealth
fields.label: 30.6 Übrige Vermögenswerte; nähere Bezeichnung
fields.description: Other assets not falling under any preceding wealth category, with their own free-text description on the source form (not separately modelled here).

fields.name: realEstateMarketValueWealth
fields.label: 31.1 Liegenschaften, zum Verkehrswert besteuert
fields.description: Taxable market value of real estate taxed at market value, per the real-estate register (Liegenschaftenverzeichnis) — a companion form this schema does not itself model.

fields.name: realEstateIncomeValueWealth
fields.label: 31.2 Liegenschaften, zum Ertragswert besteuert (Land- oder Forstwirtschaft)
fields.description: Taxable capitalized-income value of agricultural or forestry real estate.

fields.name: selfEmployedEquityCapitalWealth
fields.label: 32. Eigenkapital Selbständigerwerbender ohne Geschäftswertschriften
fields.description: A self-employed taxpayer's business equity capital, excluding business securities already reported elsewhere, per Hilfsblatt A.

fields.name: debtsWealth
fields.label: 34. Schulden
fields.description: Total debts at 31 December 2025, per the debts register (Schuldenverzeichnis) — a companion form this schema does not itself model.

fields.name: wealthAllocatedOtherCantons
fields.label: 36.1 Auf steuerbare Vermögenswerte in anderen Kantonen
fields.description: Portion of total taxable wealth attributable to other Swiss cantons under intercantonal tax allocation.

fields.name: wealthAllocatedAbroad
fields.label: 36.2 Auf steuerbare Vermögenswerte im Ausland
fields.description: Portion of total taxable wealth attributable to a foreign country under international tax allocation.

fields.name: capitalBenefitDeathOrDisabilityAmount
fields.label: 40. Kapitalleistungen aus AHV/IV, aus Einrichtung der beruflichen Vorsorge, aus Freizügigkeitskonto/-police, aus Säule 3a
fields.description: Lump-sum capital benefit received from AHV/IV, an occupational pension institution (2nd pillar), a vested-benefits account/policy, or a recognized form of tied individual pension provision (3rd pillar a), paid out on death or for lasting physical or health impairment.

fields.name: capitalBenefitDeathOrDisabilityPaymentDate
fields.label: Auszahlungsdatum
fields.description: The date capitalBenefitDeathOrDisabilityAmount was paid out.

fields.name: giftOrInheritanceReceivedDate
fields.label: 50.1 Am ... 2025 erhalten von — Datum
fields.description: Day and month in 2025 a gift, advancement of inheritance (Erbvorbezug), inheritance, or share of an undivided estate community was received (the source form fixes the year at 2025, this tax year, and asks only for day and month).

fields.name: giftOrInheritanceReceivedFromDetails
fields.label: 50.1 Am ... 2025 erhalten von
fields.description: Name, address, and degree of relationship of the person the gift/advancement of inheritance/inheritance/estate-community share was received from.

fields.name: giftOrInheritanceReceivedValue
fields.label: 50.1 Wert
fields.description: Value of the gift/advancement of inheritance/inheritance/estate-community share received.

fields.name: giftOrInheritanceGivenDate
fields.label: 50.2 Am ... 2025 ausgerichtet an — Datum
fields.description: Day and month in 2025 a gift or advancement of inheritance was made to someone else (year fixed at 2025 by the source form).

fields.name: giftOrInheritanceGivenToDetails
fields.label: 50.2 Am ... 2025 ausgerichtet an
fields.description: Name, address, and degree of relationship of the person a gift/advancement of inheritance was made to.

fields.name: giftOrInheritanceGivenValue
fields.label: 50.2 Wert
fields.description: Value of the gift/advancement of inheritance given.

fields.name: placeOfSigning
fields.label: Ort und Datum — Ort
fields.description: Place where the return is signed.

fields.name: dateOfSigning
fields.label: Ort und Datum — Datum
fields.description: Date the return is signed.

documents.label: Hilfsblatt A (Handel/Gewerbe/freie Berufe), B oder G (Landwirtschaft) — self-employment worksheet
Bescheinigung für Erwerbsausfallentschädigungen bzw. Kinder-/Familienzulagen, Mutterschaftsentschädigungen, Taggelder
Bescheinigung der Vorsorgeeinrichtung/Bankstiftung über Beiträge an die Säule 3a
Aufstellung über gemeinnützige Zuwendungen bzw. weitere Abzüge
Bestätigung für den Abzug für unterstützte Personen
Bescheinigung der Versicherungsgesellschaft über den Steuerwert der Lebens-/Rentenversicherung
Diese Steuererklärung ist vollständig und wahrheitsgetreu ausgefüllt
documents.statement: Diese Steuererklärung ist vollständig und wahrheitsgetreu ausgefüllt.

steps.title: 1. Personalien, Berufs- und Familienverhältnisse (personal, occupational, and family circumstances)
Kinder und unterstützte Personen (children and supported persons)
4. Vermögen im In- und Ausland (wealth) und weitere Angaben (further items)
Ort, Datum und Unterschrift (place, date, and signature)
